name: sysml-v2-lsp
description: Language Server Protocol implementation for SysML v2, powered by ANTLR4

sysml.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the SysML language server.

sysml.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Maximum number of problems reported per file.

sysml.inlayHints.enabled.description: Enable or disable inlay hints (ghost text showing inferred types and supertypes).

sysml.library.path.description: Path to SysML v2 standard library directory.

scripts.generate: antlr-ng -D language=TypeScript -o server/src/generated --generate-visitor true --generate-listener true grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.g4 grammar/SysMLv2Parser.g4
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run bundle-library && npm run compile && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.build:production: npm run clean && npm run generate && npm run bundle-library && npm run compile && node esbuild.mjs --production
scripts.update-grammar: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daltskin/grammars-v4/master/sysml-v2/SysMLv2Lexer.g4 -o grammar/SysMLv2Lexer.g4 && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/daltskin/grammars-v4/master/sysml-v2/SysMLv2Parser.g4 -o grammar/SysMLv2Parser.g4 && echo '✅ Grammar files updated from daltskin/grammars-v4'
scripts.postinstall: [ -f tsconfig.json ] && [ -d clients/vscode ] && cd clients/vscode && npm install && cd ../.. && cd server && npm install || true
